name: R-3 react detectors: four detectors (a11y-axe, bundle-budget, rsc-boundary, exhaustive-deps) ship per §9 R-3
command: n=0; for d in a11y-axe bundle-budget rsc-boundary exhaustive-deps; do [ -s "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/$d.sh" ] && n=$((n+1)); done; [ "$n" -eq 4 ] && echo "four_present=$n" 1>&2
